title: Sa Pa, Vietnam
html:
Stub. Mountain town in northern Vietnam; on Yahir's 2022 trip route.

What we know

  • Featured on the Vietnam prep packing list — "Hanoi to Sapa: 6 hours (direct, $12-18). Sapa to Ha Giang: 7 hours (direct)."
  • Yahir was hurt in Sapa — listed in the trip event log.
